act_tone: Urgent, focused, Tony is all-business with moments of humor to keep morale up
jarvis_state: Minimal — short status reports, occasional glitches

mission.narrative: Tony: 'Show me what you've got, kid. Impress me.'

sections.text: Hello everybody and welcome to our first creative Day first let's go over what a creative day actually is learning coding takes more than just reading and memorizing syntax although let's be real most of us still look up syntax from time to time anyway I'm basically like a professional googler when I really think about it but yes to get good at coding you also need to practice entirely on your own it doesn't matter what you code um but just that you have some sort of and goal in mind and this is what I've seen with people who are successful programmers the ones who are successful are the ones that have the desire to go out and make something on their own it's something that they're passionate about to the point where they have the energy and desire to go make something more or make something of their own those are the ones who are always the most successful and by our goal for the creative days is to help encourage people people to want to go out and do things like that on their own it's really boring listening to lectures all day but being able to actually put that knowledge to use is where I always see the Sparks Shine the brightest so every creative day we'll have a couple of sample prompts to get the neurons warmed up but you're also free to do whatever you want so you don't necessarily have to do what the sample prompts are you don't have to pick one of them you can do whatever you want but we do give a couple just in case you don't have anything you really can think of that you want to do so far you've accomplished using inputs and outputs with our dip switch and LEDs currently your ship is capable of controlling three different LEDs so first creative Day idea the easy creative Day idea as you know your ship's battery is at critical levels let's add some additional logic that only allows one light at a time once you're done share on inventor. O/f with the hashtag creative day five now the hard creative idea is currently you are only capable of turning on three lights you still have more lights in your ship such as the bathroom light and Etc however if you turn your dip switch into a binary counter you can turn on up to seven that would be binary 111 lights or six if you want the ability to turn them all off which would be utilizing 0000 0 once you're done share on adventure.

I/f with the # creative day5 just like the one before and finally there's the open-ended option as you all know come up with your own and once you're done share on adventure. With # creative day5 we really look forward to seeing what you come up with of course if you run into any trouble feel free to ask on the Facebook group again inventor. I/f it should 301 redirect direct directly to the Facebook group we have currently over 100,000 of you guys 100,000 inventors who have joined and I proud to say that for the most part we're not like stack Overflow in the sense that uh you guys are very awesome and helping out a lot of the beginners and uh I really appreciate all you guys so thank you and I look forward to seeing what you guys come up with
